prompt: {"type":"four-panel manga page","style":"soft pastel anime chibi, warm beige and cream palette, gentle morning light, rounded panel borders, clean readable Japanese dialogue, cozy comedic fantasy office slice-of-life","page":{"orientation":"vertical","panel_count":4,"gutter":"thin white spacing","border":"rounded brown outlines"},"setting":{"location":"small management office interior","details":["wooden floor","sunlit window","desk with papers","wooden chairs","bookshelves full of files and books","stacked boxes and office supplies","soft dust motes and sparkles in the light"]},"characters":[{"role":"main character","appearance":"tiny chibi sheep girl clerk with short fluffy blond bob hair, one blue eye and one amber eye, small elf-like ears, large curled ram horns, fluffy sheep hood shaped like a sheep face, white blouse, red necktie, pale pink apron dress, small pen in apron pocket"},{"role":"secondary character","appearance":"round fluffy white sheep with tiny face and short legs, very plush and cloud-like"}],"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"panel 1","position":"top","count":3,"labels":["sheep girl opening the office door and looking inside","small sheep peeking beside her","one oval speech bubble on the left and one small oval bubble on the right"]},{"title":"panel 2","position":"upper middle","count":3,"labels":["sheep girl standing by a desk with one hand on hip and one hand pointing to documents","small sheep sitting by the desk","single large oval speech bubble on the left"]},{"title":"panel 3","position":"lower middle","count":3,"labels":["sleeping fluffy sheep sprawled on top of paperwork","partial close-up of the sheep girl peeking in from the upper left with a tired expression","purple sleeping sound effect text on the right"]},{"title":"panel 4","position":"bottom","count":4,"labels":["sheep girl asleep at the desk with closed eyes and a faint smile","fluffy sheep sleeping beside her on the paperwork","warm sunlight streaming from the left window","small rectangular caption box at bottom right"]}]},"text":{"language":"Japanese","elements":[{"kind":"speech bubble","panel":1,"text":"管理人室、ここにしよう… ほわあ"},{"kind":"speech bubble","panel":1,"text":"メェ"},{"kind":"speech bubble","panel":2,"text":"おい、住民の名簿をまとめなさい"},{"kind":"speech bubble","panel":3,"text":"…名簿が もふもふに…"},{"kind":"sound effect","panel":3,"text":"Zzz…"},{"kind":"speech bubble","panel":4,"text":"あったかいから… まあいっか…"},{"kind":"caption","panel":4,"text":"{argument name="caption text" default="管理業務、進捗ゼロ"}"}]},"composition":"keep all four panels in the same office for continuity; emphasize cute facial expressions, fluffy textures, and the joke that office work stops because the sheep and clerk fall asleep together on the paperwork; make the documents clearly visible in panels 2 through 4; preserve a calm, sleepy, heartwarming tone"}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"四格漫画页","style":"柔和粉彩动漫 Q 版，温暖的米色和奶油色调，柔和的晨光，圆角分镜框，清晰易读的日语对话，温馨幽默的奇幻办公室生活片段","page":{"orientation":"垂直","panel_count":4,"gutter":"细白间距","border":"圆角棕色轮廓"},"setting":{"location":"小型管理办公室内部","details":["木地板","阳光明媚的窗户","放着文件的办公桌","木椅","堆满文件和书籍的书架","堆叠的盒子和办公用品","光线中柔和的尘埃和闪光"]},"characters":[{"role":"主角","appearance":"娇小的 Q 版羊角少女职员，留着蓬松的金色短波波头，一只蓝眼睛和一只琥珀色眼睛，小巧的精灵耳，巨大的卷曲羊角，戴着羊脸形状的蓬松羊头套，身穿白衬衫、红领带、淡粉色围裙裙，围裙口袋里插着一支小笔"},{"role":"配角","appearance":"圆滚滚、毛茸茸的白绵羊，有着小小的脸和短腿，看起来非常柔软，像云朵一样"}],"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"第一格","position":"顶部","count":3,"labels":["羊角少女打开办公室门向内看","小绵羊在她身边探头探脑","左侧有一个椭圆形对话框，右侧有一个小椭圆形对话框"]},{"title":"第二格","position":"中上","count":3,"labels":["羊角少女站在桌边，一手叉腰，一手指向文件","小绵羊坐在桌旁","左侧有一个大型椭圆形对话框"]},{"title":"第三格","position":"中下","count":3,"labels":["毛茸茸的绵羊趴在文件上睡觉","羊角少女从左上方探出头，表情疲惫","右侧有紫色的睡眠拟声词"]},{"title":"第四格","position":"底部","count":4,"labels":["羊角少女在桌边睡着了，闭着眼睛，带着淡淡的微笑","毛茸茸的绵羊在文件上陪她一起睡觉","温暖的阳光从左侧窗户射入","右下角有一个小型矩形标题框"]}]},"text":{"language":"日语","elements":[{"kind":"对话框","panel":1,"text":"管理人室、ここにしよう… ほわあ"},{"kind":"对话框","panel":1,"text":"メェ"},{"kind":"对话框","panel":2,"text":"おい、住民の名簿をまとめなさい"},{"kind":"对话框","panel":3,"text":"…名簿が もふもふに…"},{"kind":"拟声词","panel":3,"text":"Zzz…"},{"kind":"对话框","panel":4,"text":"あったかいから… まあいっか…"},{"kind":"标题","panel":4,"text":"{argument name="caption text" default="管理业务，进度为零"}"}]},"composition":"保持所有四个分镜在同一个办公室以确保连贯性；强调可爱的面部表情、毛茸茸的质感，以及办公室工作因为绵羊和职员一起在文件上睡着而停滞的笑点；使文件在第二格到第四格中清晰可见；保持平静、慵懒、温馨的基调"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 可爱的羊角少女办公室漫画页：一页四格柔和色调的奇幻办公室漫画，描绘了一位长着羊角的职员和一只毛茸茸的绵羊，将文书工作变成了一个慵懒舒适的搞笑场景。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 要求可读；包含标注/说明
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: close-up, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime, manga, fantasy]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求可读；包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
